data.title: Royal Gold will be presenting at the 29th Annual CIBC Western Institutional Conference in Denver.
data.description: A company called Royal Gold will be presenting at the 29th Annual CIBC Western Institutional Conference, which is set to take place in Denver. This conference is a significant event in the business world and typically draws in a large audience. Royal Gold will have the opportunity to showcase their business and interact with potential investors and partners. This conference provides a platform for companies to share their strategies, financial performance, and future plans. It is a valuable networking opportunity and can lead to collaborations and investments. Royal Gold's participation at this conference indicates their active involvement in the industry and their commitment to growth and transparency. The event is expected to have attendance in the hundreds, including key figures from various sectors.
Trafigura's first Venezuelan oil ships are ready to load next week.

data.title: Healthpeak Properties (NYSE: DOC) to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 2, 2026 after NYSE closes. Conference call on Feb 3, 2026 at 8am MT.
data.description: Denver-based Healthpeak Properties, a prominent healthcare real estate company trading on the NYSE under DOC, will release its Q4 2025 financial results post-market closure on February 2, 2026. Following this, they will conduct a conference call and webcast the next day at 8:00 a.m. MT to discuss their financial and operational highlights. This event is slated for February 3, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EST.

data.title: Real estate fund IGR announces monthly distributions for Jan, Feb, and Mar 2026. Webinar with Portfolio Management planned.
data.description: Philadelphia-based investment firm IGR has announced monthly distributions for January, February, and March 2026. The company will also host a webinar with portfolio management. The specific amounts of the distributions were not provided in the statement.

data.title: Bank of America to redeem $3B 5.080% Senior Notes due Jan. 2027, announced in Charlotte, N.C. on Jan. 9, 2026.
data.description: Bank of America Corporation declared that it plans to redeem all $3,000,000,000 principal amount outstanding of its 5.080% Fixed/Floating Rate Senior Notes, due January 2027 (CUSIP No. 06051GLE7) on January 20, 2026. The redemption will take place at a date following the announcement.

data.title: Point Blank Tequila wins top honors at 2025 PR%F Awards in Las Vegas. New, 100% additive-free tequila available in North Texas liquor stores.
data.description: Fort Worth, Texas, January 9, 2026 - Point Blank Tequila, a brand-new tequila with 100% natural ingredients, has made its debut in North Texas liquor outlets. It emerged victorious at the renowned 2025 PR%F Awards held in Las Vegas, a prestigious event within the beverage sector. The tequila has been praised for its additive-free composition and secured top honors at the competition. This success has stirred interest in consumers, with many curious to try the award-winning tequila in stores across North Texas.

data.title: Main Street Financial Services Corp. raises quarterly dividend by 7% to $0.15 per share for quarter ending Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: In Wooster, Ohio, on Jan. 09, 2026, Main Street Financial Services Corp. (OTCQX: MSWV), the parent company of Main Street Bank Corp., announced a cash dividend of $0.15 per share for the quarter ending Dec. 31, 2025. This marks a 7% increase from the previous quarter, with $0.01 more per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on Feb. 6, 2026, to stockholders recorded as of Jan. 26, 2026.

data.title: American Assets Trust, Inc. (NYSE:AAT) will release Q4 and year-end 2025 earnings on Feb 3, 2026 after market close.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, American Assets Trust, Inc. (NYSE:AAT) revealed that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 3, 2026, after the market closes. The Company is set to announce these earnings through a press release. This disclosure is anticipated to provide insights into the financial performance of AAT during a crucial period and will offer stakeholders valuable information. This update indicates a significant upcoming event for investors, analysts, and anyone following the financial standing of AAT. Stay tuned for the detailed report with key figures and insights.

data.title: 3E Network Tech Group closes US$2M convertible note offering with second tranche of $460K/$500K, led by Boustead as agent (Nasdaq: MASK).
data.description: On January 9th, 2026, 3E, listed on Nasdaq as MASK, announced the issuance of the second tranche of a $2 million convertible note. This tranche amounts to $460,000 out of a total of $500,000 and is classified as Class A-convertible. This follows an initial issuance on December 18th, 2025, where $1.38 million out of $1.5 million was issued. Boustead is acting as the agent in these transactions.

data.title: Wabash to host Q4 2025 earnings call on Feb. 4, 2026, at 12 p.m. ET. $WNC on NYSE.(GLOBE NEWSWIRE)
data.description: In Lafayette, Indiana, on January 9, 2026, Wabash disclosed plans to live stream its quarterly earnings conference call regarding its financial performance in the fourth quarter of 2025. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, February 4, 2026, starting at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Wabash trades on NYSE under the symbol WNC.

data.title: Saratoga Casino makes $1.0M investment in High Roller Technologies at $2.80 per share. News from Las Vegas.
data.description: High Roller Technologies, Inc. revealed that Saratoga Casino Holdings LLC invested $1.0 million in the company through a private placement. This investment involved the purchase of restricted shares of High Roller's common stock at a rate of $2.80 per share. High Roller operates renowned online casino brands, High Roller and Fruta, and is listed on NYSE under the symbol ROLR. This strategic move by Saratoga is expected to enhance the growth and operations of High Roller Technologies, Inc.

data.title: Helix Energy Solutions Group to attend Fearnley Securities Seminars in New York & London on Jan 14 & 15, 2026. Presentation info on Helix's website.
data.description: Houston-based company, Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. (NYSE: HLX), revealed its upcoming participation in the Fearnley Securities Annual Offshore Drilling & Services Seminars. The company will be attending the event in New York at the Peninsula Hotel on January 14, 2026, and in London at the Connaught Hotel on January 15, 2026. Helix stated that any investor presentation shared during these seminars will be accessible to the public and can be found on their website, www.helixesg.com. Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. specializes in offshore energy solutions.

data.title: Coca-Cola Consolidated declares $0.25 dividend per share for Q1 2026, payable Feb 6 to record stockholders on Jan 23.
data.description: Charlotte-based Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. (NASDAQ: COKE) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a dividend of $0.25 per share for the first quarter of 2026. The dividend applies to both Common Stock and Class B Common Stock. Shareholders as of the market closing on January 23, 2026, will receive the payment on February 6, 2026.

data.title: ESRT will release Q4 2025 results on Feb 17 after NYSE closes. Conference call on Feb 18, 12pm ET.
data.description: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESRT) has revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 17, 2026, following the market close on the NYSE. A conference call is scheduled for February 18, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time, during which company executives will evaluate the Q4 performance, analyze recent developments, and engage in a question-and-answer session.
